subject: Social Science
overall_learning_objectives: Understand the importance and uses of water in different sectors
Analyze reasons behind water scarcity and its effects
Learn about the water cycle and groundwater system in depth
Explore methods of water management and conservation
Develop observation, analysis, and presentation skills

lesson_plan.title: Water in Daily Life and Industries
topics_covered: Household and industrial uses of water
Water in agriculture and energy production
teaching_strategy: Show videos or charts of industrial water use
student_activities: List water uses at home, school, and industry
Discuss ways water is wasted and how to reduce it

lesson_plan.title: Water Cycle and Groundwater
topics_covered: Detailed water cycle: evaporation, condensation, precipitation, runoff
teaching_strategy: Demonstrate groundwater model using containers and sand
student_activities: Draw and label a water cycle diagram
Explain groundwater recharge in their own words

lesson_plan.title: Rivers, Lakes, and Dams
topics_covered: Artificial water bodies: reservoirs and dams
Impact of dams on environment and society
teaching_strategy: Show maps and images of major rivers and dams
Class discussion on pros and cons of dams
student_activities: Locate major rivers and dams on a map
Discuss advantages and disadvantages of dams in groups

lesson_plan.title: Water Scarcity and Pollution
topics_covered: Pollution and its effects on health and ecosystem
Case studies from India and the world
teaching_strategy: Show images of polluted water and dried rivers
Class discussion on local examples of scarcity or pollution
student_activities: List causes of water scarcity and pollution
Suggest measures to reduce water pollution locally

lesson_plan.title: Water Management and Conservation
teaching_strategy: Demonstrate rainwater harvesting using small models
student_activities: Design a small rainwater harvesting plan for school/home
Prepare a chart on water-saving techniques

lesson_plan.title: Revision and Project Sharing
topics_covered: Recap water uses, cycle, scarcity, pollution, and conservation
teaching_strategy: Interactive quiz on concepts and applications
student_activities: Answer quiz questions based on previous periods

teaching_aids: Charts and diagrams of water cycle, dams, and rivers
Videos on water scarcity and conservation
Containers and sand for groundwater model
teacher_tip: Encourage critical thinking. Include local examples and hands-on activities. Use projects to make concepts practical and memorable.
